preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 我记得你说过，你不喜欢吃鱼。
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: I remember you said you don't like eating fish.

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 你快去找他吧，时间不多了！
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: You'd better go find her quickly; there's not much time left!

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 你头发这么长，洗头发麻烦吗？
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: Your hair is so long; is it troublesome to wash it?

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 车是我第一次发朋友圈。
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: This is my first time posting on Moments.

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 他不但每天运动，而且吃很少的饭。
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: Not only does he excercise every day, but he also eats very little.

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 不好意思，今天我约了朋友。
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: sorry, I made plans with a friend today.

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 我们约七点吧？六点太早了！
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: How about we meet at 7? Six is too early!

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 我没有微信，不过我朋友有。
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: I don't have WeChat, but my friend does.

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: Can it be a little cheaper?

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 这件衣服这么大，当然不是我的。
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: This piece of clothing is so big, of course it's not mine.

preguntas.instrucciones: Listen to the audio and write what you hear.
respuesta_correcta: 最近我买了几件新衣服。
preguntas.texto_en_ingles: Recently, I bought a few new clothes.
